requests.prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Lipstick. The scene shows a minimal light-wood tabletop by a softly lit window, and adult woman with healthy natural skin enters the frame. A plain white ceramic mug is nearby. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and do not replace it with a different product. Locked-off camera medium close-up of an adult woman seated at a minimal light-wood table by a softly lit window. She wears a neutral cream top and a smooth, even application of a rosy lipstick that matches the provided product reference. On the table in front of her: a plain white ceramic mug and the real lipstick tube from the reference with its cap off, bullet exposed, logo facing camera if present. Soft diffused daylight illuminates her face and the tabletop, with a clean, uncluttered beige background. She naturally lifts the white mug one-handed, takes a small comfortable sip, then sets the mug down. With a calm, deliberate motion, she rotates the mug so the rim faces the camera and brings the rim closer until it fills. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Do not show captions, subtitles, UI, watermarks, logos, letters, or readable words.
requests.negative_prompt: visible lipstick mark on mug rim; smudged or messy lipstick; lipstick on teeth; distorted or uncanny lips; warped or duplicated fingers; extra hands; deformed or transparent mug; glass cup; chipped mug; harsh glare or overexposure; shaky handheld camera; abrupt cuts or montage; split screens; unreadable tiny logos or invented brands; mismatched lip color vs product; extreme close-up warping; heavy motion blur; noisy or cluttered background; mirror reflections; wet, drippy gloss; cracked or overly dry lips., cuts, jump cuts, montage, split screen, scene change, multiple locations, extra characters, subtitles, UI, watermarks, fake logos, random text, shaky camera, flicker, warped hands, distorted face, warped product, blurred proof detail

image_inputs.description: Shot start/key image used as the first-frame I2V conditioning image by the video backend.
Product identity reference for optional key-image/ref2img generation. It is not sent to the video backend as a separate product-reference conditioning image.

metadata.overlay_text: No cup marks • Color stays put
metadata.audio_direction: Soft, polished upbeat track; subtle sip SFX on the drink; optional gentle VO: “No cup marks. Color stays.” Keep audio clean and minimal.
metadata.visual_prompt: Locked-off camera medium close-up of an adult woman seated at a minimal light-wood table by a softly lit window. She wears a neutral cream top and a smooth, even application of a rosy lipstick that matches the provided product reference. On the table in front of her: a plain white ceramic mug and the real lipstick tube from the reference with its cap off, bullet exposed, logo facing camera if present. Soft diffused daylight illuminates her face and the tabletop, with a clean, uncluttered beige background. She naturally lifts the white mug with one hand, takes a small comfortable sip, then sets the mug down. With a calm, deliberate motion, she rotates the mug so the rim faces the camera and brings the rim closer until it fills more of the frame; the rim appears clean with no visible lipstick mark. She holds the mug steady for a clear inspection beat while giving a subtle, confident smile. The lipstick tube remains visible on the table near the mug throughout. Final hold keeps the clean white rim large in frame, her lips in soft focus behind it, and the product tube clearly present. Camera stays steady, gentle soft lighting, natural skin texture, smooth minimal movement.

critic_expectation.purpose: Judge whether the raw video is a plausible product demo for Lipstick.
hard_requirements: single continuous raw video shot with no obvious cut, montage, split screen, or scene change

complete direct prompt: Locked-off camera medium close-up of an adult woman seated at a minimal light-wood table by a softly lit window. She wears a neutral cream top and a smooth, even application of a rosy lipstick that matches the provided product reference. On the table in front.
physically plausible handling of the product by one main subject
soft_context: The shot may hint at this customer context: Lipstick transferring onto cups, leaving embarrassing rim marks and forcing touch-ups.
Do not fail only because the pain point, emotional transition, or every optional prop is incomplete.
Expected subject and scene style from asset memory: Adult woman with healthy natural skin and polished makeup focused on smooth, even lips wearing the same shade as the product reference..
must_avoid: visible lipstick mark on mug rim; smudged or messy lipstick; lipstick on teeth; distorted or uncanny lips; warped or duplicated fingers; extra hands; deformed or transparent mug; glass cup; chipped mug; harsh glare or overexposure; shaky handheld camera.
unrequested subtitles, captions, lower-third text, UI, watermarks, fake logos, background text, or random letters
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
main product action is visible and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
